summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PipelineHero restoration (iteration 224). All 12 features verified: 1) PipelineHero dark card rendered with navy gradient background, 2) Filter pills (All/Urgent/Soon) working with counts, 3) Carousel nav (arrows + counter 1/4) working, 4) TOP PRIORITY badge visible, 5) Timing badge '4 days overdue' visible, 6) School name 'Emory University' + Match 45% score displayed, 7) Action text 'Re-engage Emory University' and subtitle 'No response for 4 days — top priority' shown, 8) Journey rail with 6 stages (Added, Outreach, Talking, Visit, Offer, Committed) visible, 9) 'View school' CTA and 'Why this?' button working, 10) Emory NOT in 'Next actions' section (deduplication working - only Stanford and Florida shown), 11) 'What changed since your last update' card visible above hero, 12) Mobile responsive at 390px - school name NOT truncated.
context_for_next_testing_agent: PipelineHero restoration testing complete (iteration 224). Key verified features: 1) Original PipelineHero component from PipelineHero.js is now rendered in PipelinePage.js, 2) Dark navy gradient background (linear-gradient(135deg, #111b34 0%, #17254a 55%, #1c3568 100%)), 3) Filter pills with counts (All 4, Urgent 3, Soon 1), 4) Carousel navigation with arrows and counter (1/4), 5) Badges: TOP PRIORITY + timing badge, 6) School name + match score, 7) Action text + heroReason subtitle, 8) Journey rail with 6 stages, 9) View school CTA + Why this? button, 10) Emory deduplicated from Next Actions (PriorityBoard filters heroProgramId), 11) What Changed card (MomentumInsight) visible above hero, 12) Mobile responsive at 390px. All navigation (carousel, keyboard arrows, filter pills, View school CTA) working correctly.

pipeline_hero.subtitle: No response for 4 days — top priority
